top_findings.summary: The skill description includes a "get_screenshot" tool that requests screen capture access, which can capture any on-screen content beyond WeChat (e.g., other applications, sensitive system information). This is excessive for the stated primary purpose of managing WeChat information and sending messages, as direct integration with WeChat APIs or limited data access would suffice. Additionally, the skill accesses chat history for mimicking replies, which, while related, could lead to unnecessary data collection if not strictly minimized to only the chats being managed.
